December 6–7, 2026
Sydney, Australia

December 6–7, 2026 · Sydney, Australia

6th ML4H Symposium

ML4H is a leading venue for research at the intersection of machine learning and health — bringing together researchers, clinicians, and practitioners to advance the science and practice of ML for health.

About the workshop

Advancing machine learning for health

The ML4H workshop brings together researchers working at the intersection of machine learning and healthcare to present and discuss their work in a focused, collaborative environment.

We welcome work across the full spectrum of ML for health: from foundational methods to clinical applications, from electronic health records to medical imaging, from fairness and evaluation to deployment and real-world impact. Both novel research contributions and high-quality retrospective analyses are in scope.

Learn more about ML4H Conference history
